user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused (gamePhase === "PAUSED"), the UI is completely cleared and no HUD is shown. The user wants the HUD to remain visible during pause, but without any gray overlay or "Paused" message.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Modify the renderUI function to render the HUD when the game is paused, just like when it's playing. Change the condition from checking only "PLAYING" to checking both "PLAYING" and "PAUSED".
